sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35191" key="e)ndiakosme/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνδια-κοσμέω</orth>, <sense id="n35191.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διακοσμέω ἐν . .</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1545.tlg001:3:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ocell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
